zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes John Rauenzahner於1737年12月9日出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登時，他的父親Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner26歲，母親Elizabeth Barbara Long21歲。他於大約1761年與Elisabeth Margaretha Repp在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1814年3月9日在美國賓夕法尼亞州富蘭克林蒙哥馬利 堂史普享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johannes John Rauenzahner于1737年12月9日出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登时，他的父亲Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner26岁，母亲Elizabeth Barbara Long21岁。他于大约1761年与Elisabeth Margaretha Repp在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1814年3月9日在美国宾夕法尼亚州富蘭克林蒙哥馬利 堂史普享年76岁。

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.
Historical Boundaries: 1784: Franklin, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes John Rauenzahner was born on 9 December 1737, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, his father, Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Barbara Long, was 21. He married Elisabeth Margaretha Repp about 1761, in Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 9 March 1814, in Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes John Rauenzahner est né le 9 décembre 1737, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Barbara Long, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Margaretha Repp environ 1761, à Berks, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1814, à Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johannes John Rauenzahner am 9. Dezember 1737 in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Barbara Long 21. Er hat um 1761 in Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America Elisabeth Margaretha Repp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. März 1814 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes John Rauenzahner è nato il il 9 dicembre 1737 nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Barbara Long, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Margaretha Repp circa 1761, nel Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 marzo 1814, nel Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes John Rauenzahnerが1737年12月9日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで生まれた時，父Johann Ludwig Rauenzahnerは26歳，母Elizabeth Barbara Longは21歳であった。約1761年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州バークスでElisabeth Margaretha Reppと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1814年3月9日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フランクリンモントゴメリー トウンシュイップで76歳で死去した。

ko.Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 록랜드 타운시프

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes John Rauenzahner(이)가 1737년 12월 9일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Barbara Long(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1761년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 Elisabeth Margaretha Repp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1814년 3월 9일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 프랭클린 몽고메리 타운시프에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes John Rauenzahner nasceu em 9 de dezembro de 1737, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Barbara Long, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Margaretha Repp aproximadamente 1761, em Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1814, em Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes John Rauenzahner родился 9 декабря 1737 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Barbara Long, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Margaretha Repp около 1761 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 марта 1814 г. в местности монтгомири тоуншип, фрэнклинь, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johannes John Rauenzahner nació el 9 de diciembre de 1737, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Barbara Long, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Margaretha Repp aproximadamente 1761, en Berks, Pensilvania, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1814, en Montgomery Township, Franklin, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 76 años.
